description: The Distance From Cone node takes in the cone parameters (size and rotation) and a provided point to check. Then it returns the distance from that cone and that point.

fields.ConeCenter: The center of the cone (located at the center of the base of the cone).
fields.ConeBaseRadius: The size of the cone base's circle radius.
fields.* ([[Type:float3|float3]]): Returns the distance between that cone and the point.
